topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: ML-enhanced forecasting and wealth analytics run end-to-end on US-0010 external omniflow profile—not baseline-only with sidecar_disabled; parity with US-0009 compare/bands on production after Full sync.

docker-compose.external.yml stats-forecast service; backend forecast_ml sync phase and sidecar client; config [forecast_ml] and FORECAST_ML_ENABLED; React /forecast Compare and /wealth overlay; Grafana forecast-horizons ML panels; runbook omniflow ML section.

BUG-0010 DONE Q0013—baseline AA/AB/AC prerequisite satisfied; DEC-0049 default-off preserved until operator enables; DEC-0052 ML failure must not fail sync; no new model research beyond US-0009; STATS_FORECAST_PORT=8091 host clash; no host secrets read.

Sidecar health on external profile; post-sync ml_enhanced rows in forecast_computations; GET /api/v1/forecast with variant=ml_enhanced non-empty; Compare UI baseline+ML; wealth totals non-empty with overlay; Grafana ML panels with data; runbook steps; CI mock sidecar test.

Operator enables ML on financegnome.omniflow.cc; Full sync + recompute produces ml_enhanced series; UI compare and Grafana ML panels show data; degraded-mode copy accurate when disabled; runbook published; epic acceptance rows checked.

decomposition.rationale: Cross-cutting compose+backend+frontend+Grafana+ops surface exceeds single-sprint atomic task budget (SPRINT_MAX_TASKS=12); retain US-0013 epic identity from BUG-0010 deferral; recommend 3-4 vertical slices at sprint-plan.

recommended_slices.title: External compose + ML config enablement
recommended_slices.boundary: stats-forecast on external profile; FORECAST_ML_ENABLED; .env.example + config merge

recommended_slices.title: Sync ML pipeline + API persistence
recommended_slices.boundary: forecast_ml phase; sidecar health; ml_enhanced overlay rows; skip metadata

recommended_slices.title: UI + Grafana ML parity
recommended_slices.boundary: React Compare + wealth overlay; Grafana $forecast_variant ml_enhanced panels

recommended_slices.title: Runbook + CI sidecar fixture
recommended_slices.boundary: operator omniflow ML runbook; mock/testcontainers integration test

alternatives_considered: Split into new US-0017..0020 backlog stories now — rejected (operator epic continuity; sprint-plan owns slice IDs)
Keep undifferentiated mega-epic — rejected (SPRINT_AUTO_SPLIT=1; high cross-cutting risk)
